summary:
Recovery: Excellent

Reading: Nothing right now is flagging strain in your usual trouble spots — knees, joints, tendons, neck, or shoulders all look clear, so there's no area you need to baby today. You're someone who builds back through steadiness and discipline rather than dramatic swings, and today fits that perfectly — your body came back clean and your system feels calm and well-settled.

Performance: Push hard. You came in well above your normal recovery with steady sleep behind you, so today's a green light to go after it — just keep your protein climbing, you're running well short of where you want it.

Transit: none
